mapper.insert: insert into hall (cinema_id, name, type, row_count, col_count, total_seats, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{cinemaId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{rowCount}, #{colCount}, #{totalSeats}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update hall
cinema_id = #{cinemaId},
name = #{name},
type = #{type},
row_count = #{rowCount},
col_count = #{colCount},
total_seats = #{totalSeats},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select h.*, c.name as cinema_name from hall h left join cinema c on h.cinema_id = c.id where h.id = #{id}
